rule CDB_Initial_Access_Brokers_have_Shifted_to_H {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Initial Access Brokers have Shifted to High-Value Targets and Premium Pricing"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-31"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-FIN-11" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Operation_TrueChaos_0Day_Exploitation_Ag {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"

        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-31"

}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-34509 - OpenClaw < 2026.3.8 - Sender Allowlist Bypa"; content:"CVE-2026-34509"; nocase; sid:3139306; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
